title: Saph's Witchcraft
description: Just a Medieval styled modpack mainly centered around the bewitchment mod.
body:
This is just a Medieval styled modpack centered around bewitchment that will be consistently changing overtime made for a private server with a couple friends.



## **The main focus:
**
_Bewitchment_ - a mod mainly focused around witchcraft (spells, rituals, potion crafting, etc)

_Farmers delight_ - a wider expansion on Minecraft's farming adding various new crops (aided by a few addons)

_Hephestus_ - A fabric port of tinkerer's construct expanding the crafting and variety of tools and weapons

_Create_ - For those looking for the industrial side of minecraft in both large scale and small scale ways centered around rotational energy to create automation

## **For more exploration:**

_Betterend_ - adds multiple new biomes to the end islands

_Immersive aircraft_ - allows you to craft airships to travel the skies

_Simple ships_ - expands on the boats in minecraft by adding ships to explore the oceans of minecraft

_Distant Horizons_ - (disabled by default) expands your render distance massively without tanking performance



## **For Vanilla+ additions:**

_Amendments_ - adds many additions the vanilla Minecraft and tweaks existing blocks and items

_Supplementaries_ - similar to amendments, adds more vanilla friendly blocks and items as well as small tweaks changing the way certain blocks and items work to be more immersive

_Villager names_ - very self explanatory. Adds randomly generated names to villagers including modded villagers

_Guard Villagers_ - groups of villagers with armor and weapons will now roam the villages

_Lios Overhauled Villages_ - expansion on the design of the current villages in Minecraft

_Fabric Seasons_ - creates a seasonal calendar for Minecraft



## **Honorable Mentions:**

_Lootr_ - loot is no longer shared, loot chests can be looted by multiple players.

_You're in Grave Danger_ - adds a grave when you die so your stuff doesn't despawn

_Better Combat_ - overhaul on the combat system in Minecraft 

_Epic Knights_ - brings knight armor, weapons, and shields into the game for a more medieval theme

_Chirpy's Wildlife_ - adds a vast number of new wildlife to Minecraft

_Hybrid Aquatic_ - fills Minecraft's oceans with new aquatic life making the oceans feel more lively

_Immersive Paintings_ - allows for custom painting into Minecraft
